reasoning: As of late March 2025 (Matchweek 29 out of 38), Atletico Madrid has 57 points, trailing Real Madrid (63 points) and Barcelona (66 points). With only 9 games remaining, Atletico would need to make up a 9-point deficit on Barcelona and a 6-point deficit on Real Madrid. Historically, Barcelona and Real Madrid rarely drop enough points in the final stretch to allow a 9-point comeback, and Atletico would have to outperform both dominant teams simultaneously while maintaining an almost perfect record themselves (having just lost 4-2 to Barcelona earlier in March). Given this enormous gap and the limited time remaining, it is virtually impossible for Atletico to win La Liga this season. I am setting the probability to the minimum allowed value of 0.02 (2%).
